title: Pilot Clean: improve portfolio insight confidence legend semantics on public portfolio page
problem: On the public portfolio page, insight confidence labels are currently interpreted inconsistently by users, causing trust drop in signal interpretation. Quality rewrite note: problem statement expanded to clarify consequence, urgency, and verification boundary.
evidence: UX walkthrough: confidence label semantics misunderstood in first-pass reading
Benchmark: top fintech portfolio UIs include explicit confidence legend and interpretation hint
proposed_change: In src/components/PublicPortfolioView.tsx, add an explicit confidence legend block directly under insight title and update label text to map each level to plain-language meaning. Quality rewrite note: execution plan now includes concrete implementation and validation sequence.
expected_benefit: Users can interpret confidence correctly in one pass; trust in insight output improves and clarification friction decreases. Quality rewrite note: expected outcomes are framed for reviewer decision and measurable closure.
kpi_target: Reduce confidence-label interpretation confusion by >=25% in manual QA checklist over 20 scenarios.
benchmark_delta: Current UI lacks explicit confidence mapping; target is parity with benchmark clarity pattern used by leading fintech dashboards.
risk_controls: Limit scope to one component file (PublicPortfolioView)
Require lint/unit pass and visual sanity check artifact before review_ready
success_metrics: Legend visible and readable on mobile+desktop
No regression in insight card layout

change_spec.change: Add confidence legend section + explicit semantic label text mapping.
change_spec.why: Directly closes identified comprehension gap in user-facing insight area.

rollback_plan: Revert confidence legend commit in PublicPortfolioView and remove related artifact references.

addressedItems: Switch target file to avoid no-diff path
